zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Leigh Venables II於1298年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親John de Legh Venables I19歲，母親Elena de Baguley18歲。他於1316年之前與Maud Arderne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年在他的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Leigh Venables II于1298年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲John de Legh Venables I19岁，母亲Elena de Baguley18岁。他于1316年之前与Maud Arderne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1379年在他的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Lee , from an alternative spelling of the surname. As a girl's name it is frequently an element of compound names such as Abbie-Leigh, Jodie-Leigh, and Katie-Leigh.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Leigh Venables II was born in 1298, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, John de Legh Venables I, was 19 and his mother, Elena de Baguley, was 18. He married Maud Arderne before 1316. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1379, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Leigh Venables II est né en 1298, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Legh Venables I, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elena de Baguley, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Maud Arderne avant 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Leigh Venables II 1298 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Legh Venables I 19 und seine Mutter Elena de Baguley 18. Er hat vor 1316 Maud Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Leigh Venables II è nato il nel 1298 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John de Legh Venables I, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Elena de Baguley, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Maud Arderne prima del 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Leigh Venables IIが1298年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父John de Legh Venables Iは19歳，母Elena de Baguleyは18歳であった。1316年以前にMaud Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1379年に故郷で81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Leigh Venables II(이)가 1298년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Legh Venables I(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Baguley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1316년 이전 Maud Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Leigh Venables II nasceu em 1298, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Legh Venables I, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Baguley, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Arderne antes 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Leigh Venables II родился в 1298 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Legh Venables I было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena de Baguley, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Arderne перед 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1379 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Leigh Venables II nació en 1298, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Legh Venables I, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Elena de Baguley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Maud Arderne antes de 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
